name: HStack
summary: Horizontal `Stack` (`direction='row'`) that centers its children on the cross axis by default — the zero-config shape for rows of avatars, buttons, icons, and labels. Accepts every Stack prop except `direction`; use `<Spacer/>` or `justify` to distribute, `gap` for spacing.
bestPractices: Reach for HStack instead of `<Stack direction='row' align='center'>` — the row + cross-axis centering is the dominant case and HStack makes it zero-prop.
Distribute children with `justify` (between/around/evenly) or drop a `<Spacer/>` between groups to push them apart; avoid `sx={{ flexGrow }}` escapes.
Keep `gap` tokenized so a `compact`/`density` ancestor rescales the row; pass a breakpoint map (e.g. `gap={{ xs: 1, md: 2 }}`) for responsive spacing.
Use `as` for semantics (e.g. `as='nav'`); pass a vertically-oriented `<Divider/>` via `divider` to separate items.
